# lna.find_nodes

Find nodes by a part of their alias or public key.

## Arguments

* query (string, required): the search query.

## Returned objects

The operation returns a stream of `lna.node` objects.

## Examples

```shellsession
$ aq lna:lna.find_nodes -query fixed -out json
{"Type":"lna.node","Object":{"Alias":"","Color":"053456","CustomAlias":"fixedfloat.com","Features":"","Identity":"037f990e61acee8a7697966afd29dd88f3b1f8a7b14d625c4f8742bd952003a590","LastTimestamp":1775944613}}
{"Type":"lna.node","Object":{"Alias":"","Color":"aaff00","CustomAlias":"fixedsupply","Features":"","Identity":"0388e0278a212284bcaf7c987b873e8c30837e13f7e4e815ba67c0a470c0e92adb","LastTimestamp":1751145445}}
{"Type":"eos","Object":null}

```
